name: Plains
flavor_text: The grasslands surrounding Denethix stretch endlessly, a buffer between civilization and the wild. The city's walls are visible only as a dark line on the horizon.
art_prompt: Vast golden grasslands stretch to the horizon under soft daylight. A distant dark line marks the silhouette of a walled medieval city built atop crumbling concrete megastructures, their rusted steel frames visible against the sky. Weathered stone and timber buildings cluster within the ancient ruins. Wildflowers dot the foreground, emphasizing the buffer between civilization and untamed wilderness.. Stylized digital illustration, panoramic landscape, dramatic atmospheric perspective, concept-art establishing shot, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
design_notes: Basic land with set-themed flavor text (Haiku)
